name: Elli | WORK IS HARD
description:
FOMT SERIES: 2/7

Turns out that nearly working yourself to death catches female attention...

A/N: I’m too lazy to think of something creative like Popuri’s, so it’s the patient fall in love story. But hey, first Elli bot on Janitor! Might make SoS versions after because the differences tempt me to make them but with different scenarios, I’m not THAT lazy.
creator: LeafyBrews
